__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Eight Proposals,Mendel's Manuscript,SSB Trophy,Mysterious Relic
|rank=orange
|amount=4
|category=self
|description=Per 20 Research Manuals used, Snail DEF +18; Research Manuals Used: 400/400
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Research Manuals]]
